prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 9838→8214→32924→14758→12163，2023 年出现异常断档（32924），2024 年恢复至 14758，2025 年进一步回升至 12163，近两年呈明显回升趋势，2025 年基准约 12163 名；本省物理类计划 2021 年 21 人、2022 年 18 人、2023 年 19 人、2024 年 14 人、2025 年 18 人；2026 年计划大幅增至 31 人，较 2025 年扩招约 72%，显著增加录取名额，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年约第 48 名，近年排名稳定在 44–53 区间，属全国知名师范类高校；2026 年声誉评价偏正面，硕士报考热度高（报录比约 5:1），教育学领域人气旺盛；抖音热度一般（总排名第 67），未见明显投档断档记录；马克思主义理论 A+、教育学 A+、世界史 A+、统计学 A、生态学 A-、生物学 A-，6 个学科获 A- 及以上评级，师范类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育类专业热度 2023–2024 年处于分化观望状态，整体平稳；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 218700 人（较 2025 年总考生约 179817 人增长约 21.6%），按近年物理类占比约 67.5% 估算，2026 年物理类考生约 147600 人，较 2025 年（121443 人）明显增加，竞争基数扩大，2025 年物理类本科批 374 分、特殊类型招生控制线 475 分，2026 年；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，非本省高校；该校在甘肃省招生占比约 2.0%–2.4%，属中等偏低水平，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次回升至 12163 的走势、2026 年计划大幅扩招 72% 带来的录取名额增加、以及本省物理类考生增长约 21.6% 带来的竞争加剧，扩招幅度显著大于考生增幅，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年有所后移（位次数字增大，竞争相对缓和）；预测最低位次约 15433 名，区间 14933–15933 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 化学（师范类）
- 物理学类（物理学（师范）、电子信息科学与技术、材料物理）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学（师范）、统计学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能、教育技术学（智能教育，师范））
- 生物科学类（生物科学（师范）、生物技术）
- 地理科学类（地理科学（师范）、地理信息科学、人文地理与城乡规划）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 环境科学与工程类（环境科学、环境工程、生态学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 14933–15933 名以内建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<14933 名）可重点冲一档化学、物理学类等王牌师范专业；位次接近区间上限（>15933 名）建议以三档环境科学与工程类保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9838→8214→32924→14758→12163. An abnormal drop occurred in 2023 (32924), recovered to 14758 in 2024, and further improved to 12163 in 2025, showing a clear upward trend in the last two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 12163. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 21 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 19 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 18 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 31, an expansion of about 72% compared to 2025, substantially increasing admission slots and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 48th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 44–53 in recent years. It is a nationally renowned normal university. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is relatively positive, with high enthusiasm for master's applications (application-to-admission ratio about 5:1), especially in the field of education. Douyin popularity is moderate (overall ranking 67th), with no obvious record of enrollment gaps. It has 6 disciplines rated A- or above: Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, Ecology A-, and Biology A-. The strength in normal disciplines strongly attracts applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors in 2023–2024 was in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see, generally stable. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province is about 218,700 (an increase of about 21.6% from about 179,817 in 2025). Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 67.5%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 147,600, a significant increase from 2025 (121,443), expanding the competition base. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 374 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 475 points. For 2026, Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, not a local university. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is about 2.0%–2.4%, which is moderately low, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the recovery of the ranking to 12163 in 2025, the significant 72% expansion in the 2026 plan increasing admission slots, and the intensified competition due to a 21.6% increase in Physics Category examinees in the province, the expansion rate is notably larger than the examinee growth rate. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be lower than in 2025 (ranking number increases, competition relatively eases). The predicted minimum ranking is about 15433, with a range of 14933–15933.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Chemistry (Normal)
- Physics (Physics (Normal), Electronic Information Science and Technology, Materials Physics)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Normal), Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Educational Technology (Smart Education, Normal))
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science (Normal), Biotechnology)
- Geographical Sciences (Geographical Science (Normal), Geographic Information Science, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering, Ecology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 14933–15933, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<14933), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 majors like Chemistry and Physics (Normal). For rankings near the upper bound (>15933), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors such as Environmental Science and Engineering as a safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1534→3729→1385→1309→2140, with a significant fluctuation in 2022 (3729), dropping back to around 1300 in 2023–2024, and rising to 2140 in 2025, showing a backward trend in recent two years, with a baseline of about 2140 in 2025; the provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 12 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 9 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 14, an expansion of about 56% compared to 2025, with a significant increase in admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 48th in 2026, stable in the 44–53 range in recent years, a nationally renowned normal university; reputation evaluation in 2026 is relatively positive, with high popularity for master's applications (application-to-admission ratio about 5:1), strong popularity in education field; Douyin popularity is average (overall ranking 67th), no obvious enrollment gaps recorded; Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, World History A+, Statistics A, with outstanding strength in liberal arts advantageous disciplines, strongly attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popularity of normal/education majors in 2023–2024 was in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see, overall stable; total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 218,700 (an increase of about 21.6% from about 179,817 total examinees in 2025), estimated by the recent history category proportion of about 32.5%, the number of history category examinees in 2026 is about 71,000, a significant increase from 2025 (58,374), expanding the competition base; in 2025, the history category undergraduate batch line was 412 points, special type enrollment control line 500 points, in 2026; Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun City, Jilin Province, not a provincial university; its enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is about 2.0%–2.4%, at a moderately low level, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the trend of the 2025 ranking moving backward to 2140, the increase in admission slots due to a 56% expansion in the 2026 plan, and the intensified competition from a 21.6% increase in history category examinees in the province, the expansion rate is significantly greater than the examinee growth rate, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move backward compared to 2025 (ranking number increases, competition relatively eases); predicted minimum ranking about 2753, range 2258–3248.
